svg.font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Revised consent model: capture session, consent records per modality and tier cell, bindings per asset and modality, and assets
svg.desc: A consent capture session represents one notice, one signature and one OTP verification. It has a one to many relationship with consent records, where each record is one modality and tier cell and is independently revocable. Each consent record has a one to many relationship with consent purpose bindings, keyed on asset, modality and purpose. Bindings relate many to one with assets, so a composite asset such as a video with an audio track carries several bindings.
svg.text: Revised consent model with modality as a first-class dimension
One notice, one signature, one OTP verification
One row per modality and tier cell
Keyed on asset, modality and purpose
Composite assets carry several bindings, one per stream
Shaded entities are changed by the proposed Contract 1 amendment
